  objectcontroller.cpp:659:27: error: non-constant-expression cannot be narrowed from type 'int' to 'uint8_t' (aka 'unsigned char') in initializer list [-Wc++11-narrowing]

                            ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
